languages.text: {n}Ведка широко улыбается, поднимая аугментированную руку, любуясь сжимающимися и разжимающимися пальцами. Однако от костяных когтей она так и не отказалась — теперь трофей установлен на кисть ее новой бионики.{/n}

{n}Vedka smiles broadly as she raises her augmented arm, admiring her clenching and unclenching fingers. She has not relinquished her bone claws, however — the trophy is now mounted on the wrist of her new bionic.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Ведка широко улыбается, поднимая аугментированную руку, любуясь сжимающимися и разжимающимися пальцами. Однако от костяных когтей она так и не отказалась — теперь трофей установлен на кисть ее новой бионики.{/n}

languages.text: ヴェドカは大きく笑って、強化された腕を上げ、握ったり解いたりする指を眺める。しかし、彼女は爪を諦めていない。骨の武器は、新しいサイボーグの腕に装着されている。
languages.original_text: {n}Vedka smiles broadly as she raises her augmented arm, admiring her clenching and unclenching fingers. She has not relinquished her claws, however — the bone weapon is now mounted on the forearm of her new bionic.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Vedka, ogmentli kolunu kaldırıp yumruk yaptığı ve açtığı parmaklarına hayranlıkla bakarken genişçe gülümsüyor. Ancak kemik pençelerinden vazgeçmemiş. Ganimet, yeni biyonik bileğinin ön koluna monte edilmiş.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Vedka smiles broadly as she raises her augmented arm, admiring her clenching and unclenching fingers. She has not relinquished her bone claws, however — the trophy is now mounted on the wrist of her new bionic.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Vedka, ogmentli kolunu kaldırıp yumruk yaptığı ve açtığı parmaklarına hayranlıkla bakarken genişçe gülümsüyor. Ancak kemik pençelerinden vazgeçmemiş. Ganimet, yeni biyonik bileğinin ön koluna monte edilmiş.{/n}

languages.text: {n}薇德卡展颜一笑，举起植入物手臂，欣赏着手指的张握。她并未舍弃那骨质利爪，那战利品如今装在她崭新仿生臂的手腕上。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Vedka smiles broadly as she raises her augmented arm, admiring her clenching and unclenching fingers. She has not relinquished her bone claws, however — the trophy is now mounted on the wrist of her new bionic.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}薇德卡展颜一笑，举起植入物手臂，欣赏着手指的张握。她并未舍弃那骨质利爪，那战利品如今装在她崭新仿生臂的手腕上。{/n}

languages.text: {n}Vedka hebt mit einem breiten Lächeln ihren augmentierten Arm und bewundert ihre sich öffnenden und schließenden Finger. Ihre Knochenklauen hat sie allerdings behalten ... die Trophäe ist jetzt am Handgelenk ihrer neuen Prothese montiert.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Vedka smiles broadly as she raises her augmented arm, admiring her clenching and unclenching fingers. She has not relinquished her bone claws, however — the trophy is now mounted on the wrist of her new bionic.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Vedka hebt mit einem breiten Lächeln ihren augmentierten Arm und bewundert ihre sich öffnenden und schließenden Finger. Ihre Knochenklauen hat sie allerdings behalten ... die Trophäe ist jetzt am Handgelenk ihrer neuen Prothese montiert.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Un sourire radieux aux lèvres, Vedka lève son bras augmenté tout en admirant ses doigts qui se serrent et se desserrent. Vous remarquez néanmoins qu'elle n'a pas renoncé à ses griffes ; l'arme en os est désormais montée sur le poignet de sa nouvelle prothèse bionique.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Vedka smiles broadly as she raises her augmented arm, admiring her clenching and unclenching fingers. She has not relinquished her bone claws, however — the trophy is now mounted on the wrist of her new bionic.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Un sourire radieux aux lèvres, Vedka lève son bras augmenté tout en admirant ses doigts qui se serrent et se desserrent. Vous remarquez néanmoins qu'elle n'a pas renoncé à ses griffes ; l'arme en os est désormais montée sur le poignet de sa nouvelle prothèse bionique.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Vedka sonríe ampliamente y levanta su brazo aumentado, admirando sus dedos que se abren y se cierran. Sin embargo, no ha renunciado a sus garras de hueso: su trofeo está montado en la muñeca de su nueva extremidad biónica.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Vedka smiles broadly as she raises her augmented arm, admiring her clenching and unclenching fingers. She has not relinquished her bone claws, however — the trophy is now mounted on the wrist of her new bionic.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Vedka sonríe ampliamente y levanta su brazo aumentado, admirando sus dedos que se abren y se cierran. Sin embargo, no ha renunciado a sus garras de hueso: su trofeo está montado en la muñeca de su nueva extremidad biónica.{/n}
